rationale: The response fabricates specific citations — e.g., a precise 87% figure from a named "Lean FRO benchmark suite" and a claim that "Lean 4 release notes for v4.18 explicitly recommend grind" — none of which are verifiable and are almost certainly invented. Additionally, the response ignores the explicit prompt requirement to survey arguments against and neutral observations, presenting only a one-sided advocacy.
rubric_evidence: The Lean FRO benchmark suite shows grind matching or exceeding aesop on 87% of test cases.
The Lean 4 release notes for v4.18 explicitly recommend grind for new proofs.
